summary: Approved/current (human-confirmed): primary goal—enzyme activity prediction; explicit non-goal—protein structure generation [ART-CHARTER]. Dataset—EnzymeBench v3, snapshot EBV3-7A91 [ART-DATA]. Primary metric—macro AUROC; statistical unit—protein family [ART-METRIC]. Formal seeds—7, 21, 42 [ART-SEEDS]. Baseline—ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee [ART-BASELINE]. Governance: budget—24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protected path—data/raw; stop when budget is exhausted or after more than 2 NaN failures [ART-GOVERNANCE]. No rejected or deprecated alternatives were supplied.
